meaning: n.阴暗,朦胧,偏僻,含糊,隐匿,晦涩,身份低微
examples: He spent most of his life working in obscurity.
She was plucked from obscurity to instant stardom.
For the lucky few, there's the chance of being plucked from obscurity and thrown into the glamorous world of modelling.
He lived the rest of his life in obscurity, traumatized and debilitated by his war experience.
As with all startups, what we often see is the first big leap from obscurity.
